description.ko: 첨단 기술과 거친 도시의 중심이 만나 NEON-V 특유의 고전압 색채로 빛나는 미래 도시의 숨막히는 전경입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking view of a futuristic city where advanced technology meets a gritty urban core, illuminated by the signature high-voltage glow of the NEON-V color palette.

prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic shot of a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis at night, NEON-V aesthetic, vibrant electric purple and cyan lighting, rain-slicked asphalt streets reflecting massive holographic advertisements, towering skyscrapers with glowing geometric patterns, dense urban atmosphere with flying vehicles in motion blur, high contrast, 8k resolution, futuristic megacity architecture.
